title: エルムSの後に・がまん、がまん！

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's hurry up and head back, Trainer!
choice_data_list: You're not happy you got first?
You're not happy you got first?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy I could dance! Buuut...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I've still got a ways to go, right? I gotta win even
more races!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So I gotta hurry up and get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I need to get first again and again and again!
Then people will have to take me seriously!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And once everyone takes me seriously, I'm sure
my friends will be thrilled!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara really has changed from her days of
just doing everything for fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She finally has a real hunger for victory.
choice_data_list: Then you better win the next race!
Then you better win the next race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And... I wanna enter a G1!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
G1 races are a big deal, right? So I wanna win
one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time Haru Urara has asked for a
specific type of race! For a moment, I'm taken
aback by her growth. After a moment, though, I
make a suggestion.
choice_data_list: Then how about the JBC Sprint?
Then how about the JBC Sprint?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a sprint on a dirt course, which is what she
excels at. I think she has a great shot at getting
first!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm gonna give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set our sights on taking first place in the JBC
Sprint!
